deploy(address,string,string,uint8).notice: Deploys a OptimismSuperchainERC20 Beacon Proxy using CREATE3.

deployments(address).notice: Mapping of the deployed OptimismSuperchainERC20 to the remote token address.         This is used to keep track of the token deployments.

userdoc.notice: OptimismSuperchainERC20Factory is a factory contract that deploys OptimismSuperchainERC20 Beacon Proxies         using CREATE3.

params.deployer: Address of the account that deployed the token.
params.remoteToken: Address of the corresponding token on the remote chain.
